Radiologist Report \u2014 Chest X-Ray
\n
\n Cardiomegaly \u2014 mild (CTR 0.52). Lung fields are clear bilaterally. No pleural effusion. Mediastinum is central. Bony thorax intact. \n Impression: Mild cardiomegaly consistent with hypertensive heart disease.\n
\n

\n
Drug Allergy Alert
\n

ER No. will be auto-generated on registration

Test ParameterResultUnitReference RangeFlag
Haemoglobin (Hb)13.8g/dL13.0 \u2013 17.0
Total RBC4.6\u00d710\u2076/\u00b5L4.5 \u2013 5.5
Total WBC7,200/\u00b5L4,000 \u2013 11,000
Neutrophils78H%40 \u2013 75High
Lymphocytes18L%20 \u2013 40Low
Platelets2,40,000/\u00b5L1,50,000 \u2013 4,00,000
ESR (Westergren)28Hmm/hr0 \u2013 20Mildly High
MCV88.4fL80 \u2013 100
MCH29.6pg27 \u2013 33
MCHC33.5g/dL31.5 \u2013 36.0
PCV / Haematocrit41.2%40 \u2013 52
\n
\n Interpretation: Mild neutrophilia with relative lymphopenia \u2014 suggestive of acute bacterial infection or stress response. Mild elevation in ESR. Haemoglobin and platelet count within normal limits.\n

\u26a1 Quick Dispense
\n Token: RX-127\n
\n
\n \n
\n
RK
\n

Ravi Kumar
\n
OPD-127 \u00b7 Dr. Anand \u00b7 42M
\n
\n \u26a0 Allergies\n

Drugs to Dispense
\n
\n
\n
\n Total Amount\n \u20b91,670\n
\n
\n Insurance covered\n \u2014 \u20b9334 (20%)\n
\n
\n \n \n
\n
\n

\n\n \n
\n
\ud83d\udcca Category Stock Levels
\n
\n
\n\n \n
\n
\ud83d\udd50 Recent Dispensing
\n
\n
\n\n
\n
\n
\n
\n\n\n
\n
\n
\n
\u26a0 Drug Interaction Alert \u2014 Ravi Kumar
\n \n
\n
\n
\n
\ud83d\udea8 1 Severe Interaction Detected
\n
Prescriber notification required. Do not dispense until doctor confirms or modifies prescription.
\n
\n\n \n
\n
\n \ud83d\udea8\n
\n
Losartan + Potassium Chloride
\n
Severity: SEVERE \u00b7 Class: Hyperkalaemia Risk
\n
\n Severe\n
\n
ACE inhibitors and ARBs (Losartan) used concurrently with potassium supplements may cause dangerously elevated serum potassium levels (hyperkalemia), potentially leading to cardiac arrhythmias. Patient's serum K\u207a = 4.2 mEq/L \u2014 monitor closely.
\n
\n \n \n \n
\n
\n\n \n
\n
\n \u26a0\ufe0f\n
\n
Amlodipine + Simvastatin
\n
Severity: MODERATE \u00b7 Class: CYP3A4 Inhibition
\n
\n Moderate\n
\n
Amlodipine may increase plasma concentrations of simvastatin by inhibiting CYP3A4 metabolism. This can increase the risk of myopathy/rhabdomyolysis. Recommendation: switch simvastatin to atorvastatin or limit simvastatin dose to 20mg.
\n
\n \n \n
\n
\n\n \n
\n
\n \u2139\ufe0f\n
\n
Metformin + Alcohol (Patient advisory)
\n
Severity: MILD \u00b7 Class: Lactic Acidosis Risk
\n
\n Mild\n
\n
Advise patient to avoid excessive alcohol consumption while on Metformin. Alcohol potentiates the hypoglycemic effect and may precipitate lactic acidosis in susceptible patients.
\n
\n
\n
\n \n \n \n
\n
\n
\n\n\n
\n
\n
\n
\ud83d\udc8a Manual Prescription Entry
\n \n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n

\n \n
\n
\n \n \n

\n\n\n\n\n";MODULES["CRDT_Sync"] = "\n\n\n\n\nDiagnotica HMS \u2014 Offline Sync (CRDT)\n\n\n\n\n\n\n
\n
\n
\n You are offline\n Changes are saved locally (IndexedDB) and will sync when connection is restored.\n
\n
\n Last synced: 14 Mar 2024 \u00b7 14:48\n \n
\n
\n\n\n
\n
\n
\u27f3
\n
Diagnotica HMS
Offline Sync \u2014 CRDT Conflict-free Replicated Data Types

\n

\n
\n
\n Rural Mode: ON\n

Offline Mode \u2014 CRDT Sync Engine Active
\n
Rural Sub-Centre, Tamil Nadu \u00b7 IndexedDB local store \u00b7 50 records pending sync \u00b7 LWW + OR-Set strategy

\u2705Done
\n\n\n\n\n"; const moduleNames = {"01_PAS": "Patient Registration", "02_EMR": "Medical Records (EMR)", "03_OPD": "OPD Management", "04_ER": "Emergency (ER)", "05_LIS": "Laboratory (LIS)", "06_RIS": "Radiology (RIS)", "07_Billing": "Billing & Finance", "08_Insurance": "Insurance & TPA", "09_OT": "Operation Theatre", "10_IPD": "IPD Management", "11_Pharmacy": "Pharmacy", "12_Compliance": "Compliance (India)", "13_Appointments": "Appointments", "14_BloodBank": "Blood Bank", "15_Nursing": "Nursing Station", "16_Inventory": "Inventory & SCM", "17_HR": "HR & Staff", "18_Analytics": "Analytics & Reports", "19_PatientPortal": "Patient Portal", "20_Telemedicine": "Telemedicine", "21_Security": "Security & Access", "AI_LangGraph": "AI Agents (LangGraph)", "CRDT_Sync": "Offline Sync (CRDT)"}; let currentModule = null; const blobCache = {}; function getBlobUrl(modId) { if (blobCache[modId]) return blobCache[modId]; const html = MODULES[modId]; if (!html) return null; const blob = new Blob([html], {type: 'text/html'}); blobCache[modId] = URL.createObjectURL(blob); return blobCache[modId]; } function loadModule(modId, name, navEl) { // Update nav document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('active')); if (navEl) navEl.classList.add('active'); else { const el = document.getElementById('nav-' + modId); if (el) el.classList.add('active'); } currentModule = modId; document.getElementById('bc-current').textContent = name || moduleNames[modId] || modId; // Hide welcome document.getElementById('welcome').style.display = 'none'; // Show loading const loading = document.getElementById('loading'); const loadingText = document.getElementById('loading-text'); loading.classList.add('show'); loadingText.textContent = 'Opening ' + (name || modId) + '...'; // Load via blob URL setTimeout(() => { const url = getBlobUrl(modId); const frame = document.getElementById('frame'); if (url) { frame.src = url; frame.onload = () => { loading.classList.remove('show'); }; // Fallback remove loading after 3s setTimeout(() => loading.classList.remove('show'), 3000); } else { loading.classList.remove('show'); showToast('Module not found: ' + modId, '⚠'); } }, 50); } function showWelcome(navEl) { document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('active')); if (navEl) navEl.classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('welcome').style.display = 'flex'; document.getElementById('frame').src = 'about:blank'; document.getElementById('bc-current').textContent = 'Dashboard'; document.getElementById('loading').classList.remove('show'); currentModule = null; } function openFullscreen() { if (currentModule) { const url = getBlobUrl(currentModule); if (url) window.open(url, '_blank'); } else { document.documentElement.requestFullscreen && document.documentElement.requestFullscreen(); } } function handleSearch(e) { if (e.key !== 'Enter') return; const q = e.target.value.trim().toLowerCase(); if (!q) return; const found = Object.entries(moduleNames).find(([id, name]) => name.toLowerCase().includes(q) || id.toLowerCase().includes(q) ); if (found) { loadModule(found[0], found[1]); e.target.value = ''; } else { showToast('No module found for "' + q + '"', '🔍'); } } let _tt; function showToast(msg, icon) { const t = document.getElementById('toast'); document.getElementById('toast-msg').textContent = msg; document.getElementById('toast-icon').textContent = icon || '✅'; t.classList.add('show'); clearTimeout(_tt); _tt = setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove('show'), 3000); } // Keyboard: Ctrl/Cmd+K focuses search document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === 'k') { e.preventDefault(); document.getElementById('search-inp').focus(); } });
